rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §8.006, which addresses immunity from liability for regional education service center employees and volunteers.
quote: An employee or volunteer of a regional education service center is immune from liability to the same extent as an employee or volunteer of a school district.
_note: No textual or substantive conflict between the proposed change and the cited rule.
